description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image. Define two stages: test and release, and a global before_script that runs npm install for every job. In the test stage add a test job that executes npm run src:build then npm run test:coverage. In the release stage add a release job that runs npm run src:build, writes the NPM authentication token from the NPM_TOKEN variable into .npmrc with echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}'>.npmrc, and then runs npm run release. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
